title: “I spent $50,000 self-hosting AI models. You should too.” - 0xSero
summary: 0xSero advocates for self-hosting AI models after investing $50,000 in infrastructure, arguing this approach is worth the cost. The video covers local AI deployment strategies and discusses models like GLM 5.2 and Fable 5.
writeup: 0xSero makes the case for self-hosting AI models, drawing on a $50,000 investment in infrastructure and arguing the cost is justified. The video covers local AI deployment strategies and local inference, with discussion of models including GLM 5.2 and Fable 5. The throughline is that running models locally, rather than relying on hosted APIs, is worth the upfront spend.
